displayTitle: Kanan 3: The Last Padawan, Part III: Pivot
synopsis:
Ambushed in the Coruscant system, Caleb Dume dogfights Imperial ARC-170 starfighters and, despite the *Kasmiri* taking heavy fire, escapes into hyperspace. Lost and out of options, he plots a course back to Kaller and the hangar of Janus Kasmir, whose ship he had stolen. Kasmir, furious, seizes him by the neck but eventually offers to take him on; when Caleb sneers at him as a criminal, Kasmir loses patience, draws a blaster, and drives the boy off into the streets of Plateau City.

After surviving rough on the streets, Caleb crosses paths with Kasmir again and rescues him from a crime boss named Tapusk and his henchmen. Kasmir brings Caleb back aboard and enlists him as crew. On the Kalleran's advice, Caleb cuts his Padawan braid, hides his lightsaber and holocron, dons new clothes and a blaster, and drops his name, becoming simply "kid" until he can invent a pseudonym.

Later the two sneak into a warehouse to steal a shipment of IG-RM enforcer droids for the black market, but Caleb struggles with his new life as a thief. Before they can finish, armed Kallerans led by Gamut Key capture them, and to save himself Kasmir offers to bargain with Key by identifying his young accomplice as the fugitive Padawan Caleb.
title: Kanan 3: The Last Padawan, Part III: Pivot
